events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the cal sheet's as-found data shows a zero-point offset plus a disproportionately larger span-point error (error scales with signal, not constant), pointing to combined zero shift + span/gain drift rather than a single-point miscalibration. Called `fail` (non-compliant vs. ISA/site QC tolerance) with `degraded` condition, recommending re-zero + re-span with full range verification, and module replacement only if adjustment can't restore tolerance.
